name: HealthBrew
tagline: A marketplace platform for healthcare professionals.
highlights: Built the full platform end-to-end: admin, backend API, and data layer.
Designed HCP verification (license-number handling, role-upgrade review) with privacy-safe user exposure helpers.
Hardened with a full Playwright e2e suite running on a self-hosted CI runner.

name: Marcplaats
tagline: A hyperlocal photo-spotting app for a single city, built test-first.
highlights: Every business rule enforced at the database — RLS policies, triggers (rate limits, new-user delay), and CHECK constraints (geofencing to one city).
GPS-first upload flow with an Alkmaar-constrained manual map-pin fallback and platform-aware permission recovery.
Shipped via strict AI-TDD: a failing Playwright behaviour test before every feature.

name: Dreamy AI
tagline: A multi-agent platform that generates full-length novels from a concept.
highlights: 7-agent generation pipeline (concept → knowledge graph → blueprint → write → critique → polish) producing 80k+ word books.
Story continuity backed by a Neo4j knowledge graph; a multi-critic/reviser quality system with ML quality prediction.
Full observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Sentry) across a containerised, multi-service deployment.

name: House of Faridah
tagline: A multi-brand site for an interior-design & construction company, with its own CMS.
highlights: Two sub-brands (Interiors + Construction) in one app, plus an admin portal and a content-managed portfolio system.
Image galleries with watermarking, lightbox, and a copy-paste 'add a project' workflow for the client.
Designed from Figma, deployed on GitHub Pages.

name: Ajoko
tagline: A ROSCA (rotating savings) fintech app across web and mobile.
highlights: Full-stack fintech: backend (NestJS/Prisma), web, admin, and a mobile client.
Auth, payments, and the dual UX/security failure-mode discipline that fintech demands.
